office_does: County commissioners adopt budgets and policy and oversee county departments and services.
race_blurb: Appointed incumbent Vonda Mulrony faces Beau Blachly, for whom only filing-level evidence was available.

candidates.summary: Active candidate without an identity-safe substantive biography or stable platform.
Appointed incumbent with a financial background emphasizing fiscal responsibility and a balanced county budget.
highlights: Identifies financial responsibility and balancing the budget as central duties [S2]

spending.basis: Explicit financial responsibility and budget-balancing priorities support modest fiscal restraint.

experience.basis: Appointed incumbency establishes direct governing experience, though not a long elected tenure.
